description: Scaffold for moving from frozen tiny cases to held-out task-family prediction.

families.goal: Measure false unpredictability via metric-dependent jumps and early Fourier-style mechanism formation.
expected_risks: metric artifacts dominate the apparent jump
mechanism may be overfitted to handcrafted periodic features

families.goal: Provide a control family where the same metrics should look smooth and Fourier-style signals should stay low.
expected_risks: thresholded metrics can still introduce mild artifacts
smooth tasks may be too easy to stress the forecasting rules

families.goal: Track current theory misses and separate real unpredictability from metric artifacts.
expected_risks: forecast misses persist after metric controls

families.goal: Upgrade from proxy circuits to checkpointed transformer subgraph discovery with targeted ablations.
expected_risks: checkpoint handling is heavier than current tiny models
discovered circuits may remain unstable across seeds

families.goal: Test whether regime descriptors and feedback rules transfer to a family not used in rule tuning.
expected_risks: current Schur-inspired descriptors may not transfer cleanly
